name: BN load (Баруун наран /Зүүн/)

recommendations.lever: Smooth arrivals + cut standing time (dispatch / headway control)
recommendations.mechanism: de-bunch convoys so trucks meet the shovel evenly; overlap shift changes; in-field refuel; reduce inter-cycle parking
recommendations.anchor: truck-shovel dispatch & queueing theory (bunching wastes shovel capacity)
recommendations.caveat: needs no capex, but assumes standing time is genuinely recoverable (some is legit breaks/maintenance).

recommendations.lever: Empty-return road improvement (surface/grade/width, speed at terminals)
recommendations.mechanism: raise empty-haul speed toward free-flow; delay concentrated at the two terminals, open road is already efficient
recommendations.anchor: haul-road rolling resistance / road resistance vs truck productivity
recommendations.caveat: only lifts throughput AFTER trucks are cycle-bound, and only up to the shovel ceiling.
recommendations.note: shortens cycle; capped by shovel ceiling

recommendations.lever: Expand loading capacity (2nd loading position / faster load / bigger bucket)
recommendations.mechanism: raise the shovel service rate = raise the throughput ceiling
recommendations.anchor: theory of constraints — elevate the binding constraint
recommendations.caveat: capex; only pays ABOVE the current shovel ceiling, i.e. after idle and road are already fixed.
recommendations.prereq: only after idle+road push throughput to the shovel ceiling

caveats: DIAGNOSTIC not proof — needs before/after pilot
